message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Mengubah SubMenu

actor Administrator
boundary Dashboard_V
boundary Submenu_V
boundary EditSubmenu_V
control Admin_C
control Menu_C
entity Submenu_E

Administrator -> Dashboard_V : 1 load->view()
Administrator <-- Dashboard_V : 2 Halaman Dashboard
Administrator -> Dashboard_V : 3 klik menu Submenu management
Dashboard_V -> Admin_C : 4 Submenu()
Admin_C -> Submenu_E : 5
Admin_C <-- Submenu_E : 6
Admin_C -> Submenu_V : 7 load->view()
Administrator <-- Submenu_V : 8 Halaman Submenu management
Administrator -> Submenu_V : 9 klik tombol EditSubmenu
Submenu_V -> Admin_C : 10 EditSubmenu()
Admin_C -> EditSubmenu_V : 11 load->view()
Administrator <-- EditSubmenu_V : 12 Halaman EditSubmenu
Administrator -> EditSubmenu_V : 13 Mengisi Inputan dan klik tombol edit
note left : Inputan Submenu
EditSubmenu_V -> Menu_C : 14 EditSubmenu()
Menu_C -> Submenu_E : 15

alt [isValid() case]
    Submenu_E -> Submenu_E : 16 isValid()
    Menu_C -> Submenu_V : 17 load->view()
    Administrator <-- Submenu_V : 18 Halaman Submenu
else [isInvalid() case]
    Submenu_E -> Submenu_E : 19 isInValid()
    Menu_C -> EditSubmenu_V : 20 load->view()
    Administrator <-- EditSubmenu_V : 21 Halaman Edit Submenu
end

@enduml
```
